spec.name: auto_resolv_deps
spec.description: Automates the process of identifying and resolving dependencies for newly cloned repositories within the builder workspace.

rationale: Newly cloned projects often fail in CI/CD pipelines due to unmet dependency versions or missing packages. Automating this step via 'auto_resolv_deps' ensures immediate build success upon cloning, reducing manual overhead and failure rates. This capability is safe, idempotent, and directly addresses a common reliability failure mode in the agent builder.
